info.english_meaning: to speakto killto hurt to cover
info.hindI_arTa: bolanA mAranA duKa denA AcCAdita karanA QakanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pravalhikABirdevA asurAn pravalhyATEnAnatyAyan' (E0 brA0 633) pravalhanaM nirhfdayaM sAntvaM vacanamucyata iti zaqguruSizyaH
'etad brahmannupa valhAmasi tvA' (vA0 saM0 2351) valha prADAnye iha tvAhvAnapUrve saMharze vartata ityuvawaH upavalhAmaH sparDayA pfcCAma iti mahIDaraH
'mUrDA'sya vipated ya enamupavalheta' (Sa0 brA0 11419) sparDayA vAdaM pravartayet
